MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-04-2012 IN 206, ADVANCED FROM 1/18/12, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT KARIM MACHI'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. APPLICANT MAY RE-FILE IN THE FUTURE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
CRC 3.740 REVIEW. (610)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORDSTROM FSB RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACHI, KARIM $3,876.49 PRINCIPAL, $90.10 INTEREST, $289.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,256.09, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CRC 3.740 REVIEW - JUDGMENT ON FILE.
